hero.subline: Each piece is made once, made properly, and made to last.

bespoke.heading: Every piece begins with a conversation.
bespoke.body: Collection Noir pieces are made to order, in the stone, scale, and finish that suit the room they're going into. Bespoke commissions are welcome.

collection_overview.title: Every piece, made to order
collection_overview.intro: Browse by category, or enquire directly for a bespoke commission.

atelier.statement_1: Designed in London. Made by Italian hands.
atelier.narrative_1: Collection Noir makes bespoke furniture in marble and stone for those who see material as a form of permanence. Each piece is drawn in London and carved by hand in Italy, one commission at a time.
atelier.statement_2: No two pieces leave the atelier the same. That is craft, not inconsistency.
atelier.narrative_2: Every commission begins as a drawing in the London atelier. From there, it is realised by hands trained over generations. The collection extends beyond tables into case goods: bedside tables and storage pieces that bring stone, timber and bronze together. Every piece is made to order.

founder.name: Samantha Santini
founder.role: Founder & Designer, Collection Noir Atelier, London
founder.quote: In fifteen years of specifying furniture, one thing became clear: when I think of marble, or exquisite craftsmanship generally, Italy is always at the forefront. That understanding of materials, and the craft behind them, is what separates a good piece from an exceptional one. That's what Collection Noir is built on.

designers.heading: For designers
designers.title: A working relationship, not a transaction
designers.body: Collection Noir Atelier works directly with interior designers and architects on an individual project basis, offering trade pricing, a dedicated point of contact, and a complimentary bespoke design service.

continue_links.desc: A guide to the stones, timbers and metals we work with.
